name: Iris Necklace Dark Portrait
description: Candid close-up selfie portrait with nameplate necklace in dimly lit room, soft frontal lighting
input_prompt: woman selfie portrait dark room with gold nameplate necklace

subject.description: young woman early 20s with light brown to dirty blonde hair in messy casual bun, fair skin with natural texture

skin.texture: natural with slight rosy flush on cheeks

hair.details: several loose wispy strands falling freely to frame face and eyes

face.details: eyes: light green/grey, soft direct gaze at camera; lips: natural pink shade, closed mouth with subtle gentle smile

clothing.details: thin spaghetti straps, visible ribbed fabric texture, scoop neckline

accessories: type: delicate gold chain necklace, details: cursive nameplate pendant reading 'Iris'

pose_action.dynamic_elements: angle: selfie angle, front-facing; aesthetic: candid, realistic, casual social media style

background: indistinct furniture shapes in deep shadow

lighting.quality: highlights face and chest, creates contrast with dark background
lighting.shadows: soft shadows under jawline and clavicle

camera_technical.focus: soft focus overall, sharp on eyes

realism_anchors: visible ribbed fabric texture on tank top

luma.motion_notes: Subtle phone adjustment, gentle breathing, soft light flicker

reve.prompt: Intimate portrait photography in the style of candid social media selfies, messy bun wispy strands, black tank top gold nameplate necklace, low-key lighting against dark room, natural authentic beauty

grok-imagine.prompt: Candid selfie of woman with messy bun and wispy hair, green-grey eyes, black tank top, gold chain necklace with 'Iris' nameplate, dark room background, soft frontal lighting, intimate mood

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A candid selfie portrait of a young woman in her early 20s with light brown to dirty blonde hair styled in a messy casual bun, with several wispy strands falling freely to frame her face and eyes. She has fair skin with a natural texture and a slight rosy flush on her cheeks. Her light green-grey eyes hold a soft direct gaze at the camera, and she has a subtle gentle smile with natural pink lips and minimal makeup. She wears a black fitted ribbed tank top with thin spaghetti straps and a scoop neckline. Around her neck is a delicate gold chain necklace with a cursive nameplate pendant that reads 'Iris'. The setting is a dimly lit indoor room with indistinct furniture shapes in deep shadow behind her. Soft frontal lighting illuminates her face and chest, creating contrast with the dark background and soft shadows under her jawline. The image has a candid social media aesthetic with soft focus. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic skin texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman early 20s with messy bun hairstyle and wispy hair strands framing her face. Light green-grey eyes with soft direct gaze, subtle smile, fair skin with rosy cheeks. Black ribbed tank top with spaghetti straps, delicate gold chain necklace with cursive 'Iris' nameplate pendant. Dark dimly lit room background with soft frontal lighting. Candid selfie portrait, intimate mood, social media aesthetic. Not glamour photography, not studio lighting.
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A close-up selfie portrait of a young woman with light brown to dirty blonde hair in a messy casual bun, wispy strands framing her face. Light green-grey eyes with a soft direct gaze at camera, subtle gentle smile with natural pink lips, minimal makeup with slight rosy cheeks. She wears a black fitted ribbed tank top with spaghetti straps and a delicate gold chain necklace with a cursive nameplate pendant reading 'Iris'. Dark dimly lit room with indistinct furniture in shadow behind her. Soft frontal lighting highlights her face against the dark background. Candid social media selfie aesthetic with natural skin texture.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the nameplate text from 'Iris' to 'Luna' while keeping the necklace style, outfit, and lighting the same. Preserve the candid selfie aesthetic and soft expression.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed necklace description (cursive nameplate, specific text 'Iris'), fabric texture (ribbed)
2_realism_anchors: 'natural skin texture', 'ribbed fabric texture', 'readable cursive text', 'wispy hair catching light'
3_technical_camera: 'selfie angle', 'close-up chest-up', 'soft focus overall sharp on eyes'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents harsh lighting, studio setup, glamour look
6_lighting_storytelling: 'soft frontal against dark background' = intimate late-night mood
7_text_rendering: specific nameplate text 'Iris' in cursive script
